5.1.1: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
Seller (or applicant for BTL remortgage) must have been the registered owner for at least 6 months prior to application.
No 6-month ownership requirement for residential remortgages.
5.4.4: Environmental or contaminated land reports are generally not required.
Japanese Knotweed: No report required for RICS Management Categories C or D (formerly Risk 1 or 2) or where a treatment plan was previously completed.

Japanese Knotweed: If treatment is ongoing for Categories A or B (Risk 3 or 4), conveyancer must verify a property-specific insurance-backed guarantee (minimum 5 years post-treatment) and PCA/INNSA qualified supervision.
Japanese Knotweed: Offer will be withdrawn if Category A or B exists, or if Category 3 or 4 reports (dated within 3 months) confirm treatment is still required.
Radon Gas: No reporting required if in a radon area, but applicant must be advised of health hazards and recommendations for a PHE test.
5.4.5: Personal searches accepted if Search Agent follows the PCCB Search Code.
5.4.6: Search insurance accepted at conveyancer's risk.
Must provide an unqualified Certificate of Title.
Policy must cover successors in title or be readily assignable.
Applicant must be advised of the risks of proceeding with insurance.
5.5.3a: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
5.5.3c: No building regulation consent copies required.
5.5.3d: No certificates of lawful use/development required.
5.5.4: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
5.7.1a: Flying freeholds accepted if the flying area is 25% or less of the total floor area.
5.7.1b: Freehold flats are not accepted, except for Tyneside flats with mutually enforceable covenants.
5.7.1c: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
5.8.1: Buildings converted into max 4 flats are accepted if the borrower occupies one and owns the freehold or a share of it.
5.8.5: Leasehold flats where the borrower owns the freehold of the other flat are accepted provided the mortgage is secured on both the leasehold and the cross-freehold interest.
5.10.1: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
5.13.1: Family gifted deposits must be unconditional and genuine.
Declarations of Trust are allowed for joint purchases provided the mortgage takes priority.
Gifted deposits not accepted on BTL transactions where the vendor is a family member.
Reporting of gifted deposits is not required if conditions are met.
5.14.15a: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance accepted for absent/insolvent landlords if it renders title good and marketable.
5.14.17a: Documentation only required as specified in building safety instructions (5.14.17b).
5.14.17b: Applies to buildings 11m+ in height or 5+ storeys with 2+ dwellings.
Lending not permitted on leaseholder-owned buildings.
EWS1 rating of A1, A2, or B1 required; A3 or B2 require further checks and are limited to owner-occupied in England.
Funding for remediation must be confirmed by a developer (signed government pledge) or government scheme (DLUHC/MHCLG).
Leaseholder Deed of Certificate required prior to completion.
No EWS1 required for buildings constructed after 1 January 2020.
Only unqualified certificates of title are accepted.
5.14.17c: Remortgages follow the same requirements as section 5.14.17b.
5.14.1: Minimum unexpired lease term: 70 years at completion.
Equity Release (Lifetime Mortgages) minimum unexpired lease term: 80 years at completion.
5.14.9: Compounded RPI increases are not acceptable.
Property price linked escalations are not acceptable.
Ground rent must be reasonable; refer to lender/valuer if in doubt.
5.14.10: New Lending Department, Oakfield House, PO Box 600, Binley, Coventry, CV3 9YR
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance accepted for unsatisfactory lease terms if title is made good and marketable.
5.14.12: Ground rent/service charge receipts not required.
5.14.13: Notice receipts/evidence of service not required.
5.15.2a: Estate rent charges accepted if: Law of Property Act s121 is excluded; OR a 28-day mortgagee protection clause for enforcement notice is present; OR the owner is a resident-owned management company.
5.15.2b: Management company share certificate not required.
5.15.2c: Signed blank stock transfer form not required.
5.15.2d: Memorandum and articles of association not required.

5.17.5a: Certified copy of Power of Attorney required after completion if used for mortgage deed execution.
5.17.5b: Statutory declaration of non-revocation not required.
5.19.1: Lending not available for affordable housing, shared equity, or shared ownership.
5.20.1: Lender must be notified if solar PV panel roof space leases do not meet UK Finance minimum requirements.
5.20.3: Lease must contain a valid mortgagee break right exercisable on possession.
Tenant must bear costs of equipment removal and making good damage.
Mortgagee is not liable for Landlord covenants or loss of income due to disconnection.
Deed of Variation required if standard terms are not met.
5.20.4: Green Deal Plan details not required.

6.7.2: Warranty documents should be retained by the borrower.
6.7.3: Assignments of building standards indemnity schemes should be retained by the borrower.
6.7.4: Properties without warranties accepted if construction was monitored from the start by a qualified professional (max 10 property development).
Retrospective Professional Consultant’s Certificates (PCC) not accepted.
PCC must use standard UK Finance format with no wording amendments.
